ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "monthly_precipitation" REAL /* Monthly precipitation in millimeters */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years for the data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the climate model used */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistical summary */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code for the country */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_iso3 FOREIGN KEY ("iso3") REFERENCES countries ("iso3")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso3"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of climate model */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute that developed the model */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical summary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical summary */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical summary */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent to which the region belongs */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
